body.dependency: "<Kontaktaa>" "kontaktata" V Act Ind Prs Sg3 @FMV #1->0 : "<Freda-vasthaanottoa>" "Freda-vasthaanottoa" ? @X #2->0 "<:>" ":" CLB #3->1 : "<¶>" "¶" CLB #4->1 :\n "<Kontaktaa>" "kontaktata" V Act Ind Prs Sg3 @FMV #1->0 : "<EQ-vasthaanottoa>" "vasthaanotto" N Sg Par @<OBJ #2->1 "EQ" Use/Circ Use/SpellNoSugg N Prop Sem/Org ACR Dyn Cmp/Hyph #2->1 "<:>" ":" CLB #3->1 : "<¶>" "¶" CLB #4->1 :\n
